site.title: Online Drawing Classes
site.description: Private drawing and fine arts classes for kids and teens. Online, live, with personalized attention.

hero.title:
Draw your world,
with someone who knows how to guide you
hero.subtitle: Online drawing and fine arts classes for elementary and middle school kids. Personalized learning in Spanish, English or Ukrainian.

servicios.title: Class formats
servicios.subtitle: Every student is unique. That's why I offer two paths.

individual.title: One-on-One Classes
individual.desc: Full attention, at the student's own pace. From drawing foundations to advanced techniques. Ideal for beginners or those who want steady guidance.

mentoria.title: Mentorship
mentoria.desc: For students who already know the basics and want to specialize: digital illustration, comics, concept art, digital painting. A custom plan with clear goals.

idiomas.title: In your language
idiomas.desc: Classes are taught in Spanish, English or Ukrainian. Students learn art while practicing a second language.

galeria.title: Gallery
galeria.subtitle: Student work and personal pieces that show what's possible.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, techniques, and insights about drawing and teaching.
blog.sin_articulos: No articles yet. We'll share content soon!

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.subtitle: Book your first class or ask me anything.

form.exito: Message sent! I'll get back to you shortly.

info.horarios: Mon to Fri — 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM (GMT-3)
